userGroups.name: Drainage Action Group
userGroups.philosophy: Flooding is a collective problem that demands hydrological evidence, not panic or politics. We work with data, affected residents, and the council to propose drainage solutions that address root causes rather than symptoms.

userGroups.name: Land Stewards Collective
userGroups.philosophy: Vacant land is a resource, not a nuisance. We bring together land rights knowledge, ecological expertise, and community planning to propose responsible uses for neglected spaces before they become entrenched problems.

userGroups.name: Eastshire Growing Network
userGroups.philosophy: Food sovereignty begins in soil. We connect growers, seed-savers, and landholders to build a resilient, distributed food commons across the district — one plot, one seed swap, one rooftop at a time.

userGroups.name: Cycle Advocates Eastshire
userGroups.philosophy: Safe cycling is not a luxury — it is infrastructure policy. We audit routes, document hazards, and negotiate with transport authorities to make the case for improvements with evidence rather than goodwill.
